Objective to analyse the risk factors for early mortality in patients with heterotaxy syndrome undergoing single ventricle series palliation.
Situs inersus totalis occurs in 50% of PCD patients (Kartagener's syndrome in PCD), and there are a few reports of PCD with heterotaxy (situs ambiguous), such as cardiovascular anomalies.
